incidents.title: Severe Flooding in Kerala — Multiple Districts Affected
incidents.summary: Heavy monsoon rains have caused severe flooding across multiple districts in Kerala. Thousands of people have been evacuated from low-lying areas. Major roads and bridges are damaged, and several villages are cut off from access.

incidents.title: 6.2 Magnitude Earthquake Strikes Himachal Pradesh
incidents.summary: A 6.2 magnitude earthquake has struck the Himachal Pradesh region. Multiple buildings have collapsed, and there are reports of casualties. Rescue operations are underway in affected areas.

incidents.title: Cyclone Remal Approaches Odisha Coast
incidents.summary: Cyclone Remal is approaching the Odisha coast with wind speeds exceeding 150 km/h. Coastal areas have been evacuated, and fishing boats have been recalled. Heavy rainfall and storm surge are expected.

seed_need_cards.explanation: Immediate food supply needed for evacuated families in relief camps
Contaminated water sources require purification for drinking
Medical supplies for treating injuries from flooding
Urgent need for rescue teams to search for survivors in collapsed buildings

seed_need_cards.note: Store in safe locations away from storm surge
